data.title: US judge dismisses SEC’s lawsuit against Richard Heart and Hex, PulseChain on jurisdictional grounds
data.description:
The judge ruled that statements Heart made after the "offer period" of the assets were irrelevant to the SEC's claims of fraud.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Predicts 195% Bitcoin Rally, Says Bull Market Not Over Yet
data.description:
The bull market for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is far from over, according to crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe. 
What Happened: Despite the recent correction of the cryptocurrency to the $80,000 range, van de Poppe foresees a significant rally for Bitcoin.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44065728/crypto-analyst-predicts-195-bitcoin-rally-says-bull-market-not-over-yet?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Milei’s ‘Libragate’ scandal, explained: What’s behind the controversy?
data.description:
Milei’s LIBRA crypto post sent prices soaring, then crashing. The controversy has left investors dealing with losses and Milei facing a legal and political fallout.

data.title: BlackRock puts 1-2% of allocation portfolios into its Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
BlackRock is now officially putting Bitcoin into its $150 billion model-portfolio. The company has decided to allocate 1% to 2% of these portfolios to IBIT, its $48 billion iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF, according to a report by Bloomberg. This is a big change in how the world’s largest asset manager approaches crypto, adding the ETF […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-allocation-portfolios-bitcoin-etf/

data.description:
